name: Sensitive Information in Resource Not Removed Before Reuse
description: The product releases a resource such as memory or a file for reuse without clearing the sensitive data it contains. When the resource is reallocated to another process or entity, the previous sensitive information remains accessible, leading to information disclosure.
detection_pattern: Look for STORAGE nodes (memory buffers, heap allocations, temp files) that are released or deallocated and then flow to a new INGRESS or EXTERNAL node (reallocation, new process) without a TRANSFORM mediator (zeroization, memset, secure wipe) that clears the sensitive content before the resource is reused.
